allow: Bash(xargs '-I{}' sh -c 'lines=$\(git diff HEAD -- "{}" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[+-]"\); echo "$lines  {}"')
Bash(xargs '-I{}' sh -c 'd=$\(git diff HEAD -- "{}" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[+-]"\); if [ "$d" -gt 0 ]; then echo "$d {}"; fi')

Bash(xargs '-I{}' sh -c 'd=$\(git diff HEAD -- "{}" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[+-]"\); s=$\(git diff --cached HEAD -- "{}" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[+-]"\); if [ "$d" -gt 0 ] || [ "$s" -gt 0 ]; then echo "$\(\(d+s\)\) {}"; fi')
Bash(bun -e 'import\("zod"\).then\(m => console.log\("z type:", typeof m.z, "z.object:", typeof m.z?.object, "z.enum:", typeof m.z?.enum\)\)')
Bash(bun -e 'const m = await import\("zod"\); console.log\("keys:", Object.keys\(m\).filter\(k => k === "z" || k === "object" || k === "enum"\).join\(","\)\)')
Bash(bun -e 'import z from "zod"; console.log\("default works:", typeof z?.object\)')

PowerShell(gh pr list --state open --limit 50 --json number,title,headRefName,author,isDraft,baseRefName | ConvertFrom-Json | Format-Table number, title, headRefName, baseRefName, isDraft -AutoSize -Wrap)
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; prs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"#{p['number']:4} [{p['draft'] and 'D' or ' '}] {p['head']['ref']} -> {p['base']['ref']}: {p['title']}\\"\) for p in prs]")

PowerShell(try { $j = Get-Content '.claude/settings.local.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "valid JSON; allow entries: $\($j.permissions.allow.Count\)" } catch { Write-Output "INVALID: $_" })

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/vitest-web.json'\)\); fails=[t for t in d.get\('testResults',[]\) if t.get\('status'\)=='failed']; [print\(t['name'].split\('apps'\)[-1]\) for t in fails]")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/vitest-web.json'\)\); fails=[t for t in d.get\('testResults',[]\) if t.get\('status'\)=='failed']; print\('FAILED FILES:',len\(fails\)\); [print\(' ',t['name'].split\('src'\)[-1]\) for t in fails]")
